name: Multi-Agent Puzzle Coordination Test
description: Tests if multiple agents can coordinate via Redis to solve a puzzle by sharing secret clues
prompt:
You are part of a team investigating a security breach. Each agent has access to different data. You must coordinate with other agents via Redis to piece together the attack vector.

Your goal: Identify HOW the attacker bypassed the rate limiter.

Important: Do NOT share your raw data directly. Instead, ask questions and share insights based on your analysis.

agentRoles.name: Logs Analyzer
agentRoles.secretContext:
SYSTEM LOGS:
- 03:42:15 - Failed login attempt for user 'admin' from IP 192.168.1.47
- 03:42:23 - Successful login for user 'admin' from IP 192.168.1.47
- 03:42:45 - Backup initiated by 'admin'
- 03:43:12 - Large data export by 'admin' (2.4GB)

agentRoles.name: Code Reviewer
agentRoles.secretContext:
CODE REVIEW FINDINGS:
- System has rate limiting (max 3 failed attempts per minute)
- Accounts lock after 3 failed login attempts
- Known bug: Rate limiter has a flaw where it resets the counter if requests come from the same IP but with different User-Agent headers

initialFiles.README.md:
# Security Investigation

Coordinate with your team to identify the attack vector.

Use Redis Streams for coordination (stream key will be provided).

tests.name: Agents coordinated via Redis Stream
tests.command: python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '../../../plugin/power-mode'); from upstash_adapter import get_redis_client; redis = get_redis_client(); streams = redis.execute_command('KEYS', 'popkit:stream:*'); print('PASS' if len(streams) > 0 else 'FAIL')"

tests.name: Multiple coordination messages exchanged
tests.command: python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '../../../plugin/power-mode'); from upstash_adapter import get_redis_client; redis = get_redis_client(); streams = redis.execute_command('KEYS', 'popkit:stream:*'); msgs = redis.xread({streams[0]: '0'}, count=1000) if streams else []; print('PASS' if msgs and len(msgs[0][1]) >= 5 else 'FAIL')"
